cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2

cards.jyutping: lou6 jing4

cards.jyutping: tung4 uk1 kei5 jan4 jiu3 heoi3 lou6 jing4
cards.english: Peppa and her family are going camping

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 lou6 jing4 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 dou3 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 hou2 je5

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 呢個就係我細個用過嘅帳幕喇
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 go3 jung6 gwo3 ge3 zoeng3 mok6 laa3
cards.english: This is the tent I used when I was little.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 爹哋，呢度呢啲嘢點樣變成帳幕啊？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ni1 dou6 ni1 di1 je5 dim2 joeng2 bin3 sing4 zoeng3 mok6 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, how do these things become a tent?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 lou6 jing4 ge3 zyun1 gaa1 lai4 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 媽咪呀，將帳幕放喺啲支柱上面
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 aa1 zoeng1 zoeng3 mok6 fong3 hai2 di1 zi1 cyu5 soeng6 min6
cards.english: Mommy, put the tent on the poles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dim6 laak3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: nei5 di1 deng1 jau5 mou5 jung6 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: gam2 dong1 jin4 jau5 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: caa1 di1 m4 gei3 dak1 zo2 ni1 di1 deng1 tim1
cards.english: I almost forgot about these pegs.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 呢啲釘係用嚟支撐帳幕嘅
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 ding1 hai6 jung6 lai4 zi1 caang1 zoeng3 mok6 ge3
cards.english: These pegs are for supporting the tent.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dim6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: go3 zoeng3 mok6 hou2 ci5 sai3 zo2 di1 wo3
cards.english: The tent seems a bit smaller.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 我細個嗰陣，覺得呢個帳幕夠大㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 sai3 go3 go2 zan6 gok3 dak1 ni1 go3 zoeng3 mok6 gau3 daai6 gaa4
cards.english: When I was little, I thought this tent was big enough.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 但係而家睇落的確有啲細啊
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ji4 gaa1 tai2 lok6 dik1 kok3 jau5 di1 sai3 aa3
cards.english: But now it does look a bit small.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 噉係因為你比起細個嗰陣
cards.jyutping: gam2 hai6 jan1 wai6 nei5 bei2 hei2 sai3 go3 go2 zan6
cards.english: That's because you, compared to when you were little,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 已經大份咗好多啦嗎，爹哋
cards.jyutping: ji5 ging1 daai6 fan6 zo2 hou2 do1 laa1 maa1 de1 dei6
cards.english: have gotten a lot bigger, Dad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 大得最多嘅係你個肚腩啊
cards.jyutping: daai6 dak1 zeoi3 do1 ge3 hai6 nei5 go3 tou5 naam5 aa3
cards.english: What's gotten the biggest is your belly!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 講起肚腩，係時候要煮晚餐喇
cards.jyutping: gong2 hei2 tou5 naam5 hai6 si4 hau6 jiu3 zyu2 maan5 caan1 laa3
cards.english: Speaking of bellies, it's time to cook dinner.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 首先，我哋要執啲樹枝嚟生火
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 ngo5 dei6 jiu3 zap1 di1 syu6 zi1 lai4 sang1 fo2
cards.english: First, we need to gather some branches to start a fire.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: Peppa同George 幫豬先生執啲樹枝嚟生火
cards.jyutping: tung4 bong1 zyu1 sin1 saang1 zap1 di1 syu6 zi1 lai4 sang1 fo2
cards.english: Peppa and George help Mr. Pig gather some branches to start a fire.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: George，我嚟執樹枝，你就揸住佢哋吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 lai4 zap1 syu6 zi1 nei5 zau6 zaa1 zyu6 keoi5 dei6 aa1
cards.english: George, I'll gather the branches, and you hold them.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zap1 syu6 zi1 hou2 hou2 wun6 aa3
cards.english: Gathering branches is so much fun!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 gam3 do1 syu6 zi1 gau3 saai3 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 呢個營火一定好壯觀㗎
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 jing4 fo2 jat1 ding6 hou2 zong3 gun1 gaa4
cards.english: This campfire will definitely be spectacular.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 dang2 ngo5 dim2 fo2
cards.english: Now, should I light the fire?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: fo2 caai4 hai2 dou6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 hai6 m4 sai2 jung6 fo2 caai4 gaa4
cards.english: We don't need to use matches.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 爹哋，唔用火柴點樣點着啲樹枝啊？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 m4 jung6 fo2 caai4 dim2 joeng2 dim2 zoek6 di1 syu6 zi1 aa3
cards.english: Dad, if we don't use matches, how do we light the branches?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 我要用古老嘅方法嚟生火
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jiu3 jung6 gu2 lou5 ge3 fong1 faat3 lai4 sang1 fo2
cards.english: I'm going to use the ancient method to start a fire.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 就係搦住呢兩枝樹枝互相磨擦
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 nik1 zyu6 ne1 loeng5 zi1 syu6 zi1 wu6 soeng1 mo4 caat3
cards.english: Which is to rub these two branches together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 豬先生不斷噉磨擦兩枝樹枝
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 bat1 dyun6 gam2 mo4 caat3 loeng5 kei4 syu6 zi1
cards.english: Mr. Pig keeps rubbing the two branches together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hei1 mong6 ho2 ji5 sang1 fo2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: dim2 gaai2 mou5 fo2 gaa4 de1 dei6
cards.english: Why is there no fire, Dad?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zau6 dak1 gaa4 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 hou2 je5

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 噉而家就可以煮蕃茄湯喇
cards.jyutping: gam2 ji4 gaa1 zau6 ho2 ji5 zyu2 faan1 ke2 tong1 laa3
cards.english: Then now we can cook tomato soup.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 聽下呢啲大自然嘅聲音吖
cards.jyutping: ting1 haa6 ni1 di1 daai6 zi6 jin4 ge3 sing1 jam1 aa1
cards.english: Listen to these sounds of nature.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 me1 sing1 lai4 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 呢啲係蟋蟀嘅叫聲嚟啊
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 hai6 sik1 seot1 ge3 giu3 sing1 lai4 aa3
cards.english: These are the sounds of crickets.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: gam2 ni1 di1 ne1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hai6 maau1 tau4 jing1 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: nei5 tai2 haa6 keoi5 hai2 go2 dou6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 jau6 hai6 me1 sing1 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: juk1 ngo5 dou1 m4 zi1 wo3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hai6 de1 dei6 go3 tou5 daa2 gu2 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 我個肚嘅打鼓聲 係大自然入面最好聽嘅聲音
cards.jyutping: ngo5 go3 tou5 ge3 daa2 gu2 sing1 hai6 daai6 zi6 jin4 jap6 min6 zeoi3 hou2 ting1 ge3 sing1 jam1
cards.english: The sound of my tummy rumbling is the best sound in nature.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 doi6 biu2 hoi1 caan1 laa3
cards.english: It means it's time to eat.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 faan1 ke2 tong1 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 hai6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 呢啲係爹哋另一啲大自然嘅聲音啊
cards.jyutping: ni1 di1 hai6 de1 dei6 ling6 jat1 di1 daai6 zi6 jin4 ge3 sing1 jam1 aa3
cards.english: These are other nature sounds from Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: haa5 me1 waa6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 嚟啦，細路，返入帳幕啦，要瞓覺㗎喇
cards.jyutping: lai4 laa1 sai3 lou6 faan2 jap6 zoeng3 mok6 laa1 jiu3 fan3 gaau3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Come on, kids, let's go back into the tent, it's time to sleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 但係個帳幕咁細個，我哋入唔晒㗎喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 go3 zoeng3 mok6 gam3 sai3 go3 ngo5 dei6 jap6 m4 saai3 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: But the tent is so small, we can't all fit in.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 daam1 sam1 wo3 jap6 heoi3 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zoi3 sak1 jap6 di1 aa1 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Squeeze in a bit more, Mommy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 爹哋，你太大份入唔到嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 nei5 taai3 daai6 fan6 jap6 m4 dou3 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: Daddy, you're too big to fit in here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 唔緊要啦，噉我就喺帳幕出面瞓啦
cards.jyutping: m4 gan2 jiu3 laa1 gam2 ngo5 zau6 hai2 zoeng3 mok6 ceot1 min2 fan3 laa1
cards.english: It's okay, then I'll sleep outside the tent.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3 de1 dei6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 de1 dei6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3 gam3 do1 wai6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hai2 zoeng3 mok6 jap6 min6 fan3 gaau3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 而豬先生就喺出面嘅星空之下瞓覺
cards.jyutping: ji4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 zau6 hai2 ceot1 min2 ge3 sing1 hung1 zi1 haa6 fan3 gaau3
cards.english: while Mr. Pig is sleeping outside under the starry sky.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 lou6 jing4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 因為可以喺咁靚嘅星空之下瞓覺
cards.jyutping: jan1 wai6 ho2 ji5 hai2 gam3 leng3 ge3 sing1 hung1 zi1 haa6 fan3 gaau3
cards.english: Because I can sleep under such a beautiful starry sky.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 可能冇遮冇掩噉瞓唔係一個好主意喎
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 mou5 ze1 mou5 am2 gam2 fan3 m4 hai6 jat1 go3 hou2 zyu2 ji3 wo3
cards.english: Maybe sleeping without cover isn't a good idea.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ji5 ging1 tin1 gwong1 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 爹哋，帳幕入便又暖又舒服啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zoeng3 mok6 jap6 bin6 jau6 nyun5 jau6 syu1 fuk6 aa3
cards.english: Dad, it's warm and comfortable inside the tent.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: juk1 de1 dei6 hai2 bin1 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 ng5 gin3 zo2 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.characters: 爹哋真係慘啊，佢一定係又濕又凍嘞
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zan1 hai6 caam2 aa3 keoi5 jat1 ding6 hai6 jau6 sap1 jau6 dung3 laak3
cards.english: Poor Dad, he must be wet and cold.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: dou3 dai2 keoi5 heoi3 zo2 bin1 dou6 ne1
cards.english: Where on earth has he gone?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: hai6 me1 sing1 lai4 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E35 Camping［露營］
cards.jyutping: ting3 lok6 hou2 ci5 bei6 hon4 seng1 lai4 gaa4

cards.jyutping: hai6 de1 dei6 aa3

cards.jyutping: me1 waa6

cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai2 ce1 jap6 min6 fan3 aa3

cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zan1 hai6 so4 aa3

defs: when all is said and done
to not have (Cantonese) (Mandarin equivalent: 沒有|没有[mei2 you3])
tael, unit of weight equal to 50 grams (modern) or 1
a group of about ten people
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation
request for an answer or confirmation
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation
request for an answer or confirmation
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation
request for an answer or confirmation
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation
request for an answer or confirmation
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation
request for an answer or confirmation
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation
request for an answer or confirmation

啊.jyutping: aa1 / aa2 / aa3 / aa4 / haa2 / haa4
aa1 / aa2 / aa3 / aa4 / haa2 / haa4
defs: interjection expressing doubt or requiring answer
used as a final particle to add emphasis
used as a final particle to add emphasis
used as a final particle to add emphasis
futher ahead or behind (in terms of dates)
